title: Johnson & Johnson Cancer Trial Update Puts Erda-iDRS In Valuation Focus
summary: Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) reported encouraging Phase 1 data for Erda-iDRS, an investigational drug-releasing system for certain non muscle invasive bladder cancers with FGFR alterations. The study met its primary safety goal and showed high rates of durable complete responses and recurrence free survival in intermediate and high risk patients. These results support ongoing Phase 2 and Phase 3 trials that are designed to further assess this localized, targeted approach. For investors...

title: FDA Approval Of TECNIS PureSee IOL Adds New Lens For J&J Investors
summary: Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) received FDA approval for its TECNIS PureSee IOL, an extended depth of focus intraocular lens for cataract patients. The lens is described as the first of its kind in the U.S. without a warning on loss of contrast sensitivity. TECNIS PureSee IOL is intended to address both cataract related vision loss and presbyopia and may reduce patients' reliance on glasses after surgery. For Johnson & Johnson, this approval adds another product to its surgical vision and...
